title: PolyTech
description: a server-side tech and automation mod for Minecraft 1.21.11, built on the Fabric API using Polymer. It introduces a comprehensive energy network and a suite of machines designed to process resources and automate crafting.
body:
# ⚙️ PolyTech

🖥️ Server-side tech + automation • Fabric API • Polymer • Minecraft 1.21.11  
⚡ Adds energy networks, industrial machines, quarry systems, villager processing, and large-scale automation.

---

## ✨ Key Features

⚡ **Energy System**
- Uses **Power Units (PU)** over a ➕ 6-way connectable **Cable** grid
- Upgradeable tiers: **LV → MV → HV → EV**
- 📡 Dimension-wide **wireless power** with 🎨 **16 color channels**
- 🔋 **Battery Boxes** for energy storage and distribution
- ☀️ **Solar Panels** for renewable power generation

🏭 **Industrial Machines**
- 🔥 **Generator**: burns furnace fuels to produce power
- 🪨 **Macerator**: grinds items into dust
- 🧱 **Compressor**: makes plates and compressed materials
- 🔥 **Electric Furnace**
- 👥 **Villager Grinder**: processes villagers into **Villager Souls**
- 🧬 **Villager Combiner**: combines villagers for trait optimization

⛏️ **Quarry Automation**
- ⛏️ **Quarry Block** with moving drill head for frame-based mining
- 🧨 **Chunk Destroyer** for large-scale chunk-by-chunk excavation
- 🧱 **Quarry Frames** to define and visualize mining areas
- 📦 **Digital Chest compatibility** for direct mined-item deposit

🤖 **Automation**
- 🧠 **Digital Crafter (endgame)** connects to a 🎨 Digital Chest color channel
- 📋 Scans and executes crafting recipes automatically
- 🎛️ Machine-specific GUIs for control and monitoring
- 🔀 All machines support per-face I/O: ⬅️ Input • ➡️ Output • ➖ Normal • 🚫 Disabled

📦 **Materials & Progression**
- 🪙 New processed resources including **Iron Dust**, **Gold Dust**, and **Copper Dust**
- 🧱 New compressed materials including **Iron Plates**, **Gold Plates**, and **Copper Plates**
- 👻 **Villager Soul** as a specialized advanced resource
- 📘 **PolyTech Handbook** for in-game documentation and progression help

🪄 **Dynamic Visuals & GUIs**
- ✨ Floating holographic text shows status, progress, and power warnings
- 🧪 Runtime-generated resource pack with custom models and GUIs
- 🖱️ Drag-and-drop slot UI
- 🧰 Expanded machine interfaces for more advanced systems

🔗 **Integrations**
- 📦 **Digital Chest** support for automation and quarry output
- 🚰 **Polymer Pipes** support for item and fluid transport
- 📚 **Polydex integration** for recipe browsing with custom categories

---

## 🛠️ Summary

PolyTech is growing into a much larger automation mod focused on **energy**, **industrial processing**, **quarry mining**, **villager-based progression**, and **cross-mod infrastructure** — all with **server-side Polymer compatibility** for vanilla-friendly multiplayer play.
